post.title: Simulated Annealing: Ising Model Project
post.description: Hands-on Ising model + Metropolis validation, then simulated annealing in 3D: local energy updates, periodic boundaries, and checking physics before trusting the optimizer.
post.excerpt: Note: The math behind the acceptance rule and cooling is in the companion post: Simulated Annealing: From Physics to Optimization. Project…
